Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Appoint Referee
Off Calendar Jan-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID CHIA JR., DANIEL CHIA, TRACY CHIA, DAVIDSON CHIA Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Appoint Referee

is MOOT. This motion was made pursuant to Section/Paragraph 2 of May 7, 2025 Stipulation and Order. See Notice of Motion and Points and Authorities. Pursuant to the Plaintiff's Status Conference Statement filed on January 23, 2025, the matter has been resolved. To the extent Plaintiff's Status Conference Statement requests an appointment of a referee pursuant to section 7 of the May 7,2025 Stipulation and Order, the request is not being addressed as it is not properly before the Court on this Motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2026 Continued To Mar-18-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Appoint Referee
Off Calendar Dec-18-2025 Continued To Jan-30-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' MOTION AND NOTICE OF HEARING TO APPOINT REFEREE is continued to January 30, 2026 per request of the parties. No later than January 24, 2026 parties to submit a joint or separate brief addressing the matters outlined in October 30, 2025 ruling.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Appoint Referee
Off Calendar Nov-21-2025 Continued To Dec-18-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID CHIA JR., DANIEL CHIA, TRACY CHIA, DAVIDSON CHIA Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Appoint Referee

is continued to December 18, 2025 per request of the parties.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Appoint Referee
Off Calendar Oct-30-2025 Continued To Nov-21-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Appoint Referee

is continued to November 21, 2025.

Parties are ordered to meet and confer on the following issues:
(1) prices of comparable properties in the area;
(2) the price of the property in its current condition;
(3) parties' respective positions on the listing price;
(4) parties' respective positions regarding the extent and the cost of repairs, if any, before the property is to be marketed at the desired listing price.

Input from the parties' broker, Darren Kuiper, shall be obtained and considered.

No later that November 14, 2025 by 5:00 p.m. parties to file a joint or separate briefs addressing the above matters.
The brief shall include:
(1) list of comparable properties considered with prices;
(2) parties' respective positions on the price of the property in its current condition;
(3) parties' respective positions on the listing price;
(4) parties' respective positions regarding the extent and the cost of repairs, if any, before the property is to be marketed at the desired listing price.

Either of both sides shall attach a report/declaration from the broker.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing To Appoint Referee
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Continued To Oct-30-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO APPOINT REFEREE is continued to October 30, 2025 for the moving party to deliver a courtesy copy of reply no later than October 17, 2025 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (moving and opposition received).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
